# Trigonometry for celestial distances

## Short Teaching Summary
Trigonometry for celestial distances: Trigonometry was once used by astronomers to compute the distance between the planets, the Earth and stars. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
